title: Security Architecture Review
prompt:
Review this multi-tenant SaaS auth architecture for vulnerabilities:

JWT auth (24h access + 7d refresh), RBAC with 5 roles, tenant isolation via tenant_id JWT claim, API gateway JWT validation, mTLS between services, Postgres RLS, SHA-256 hashed API keys.

Analyze: token lifecycle, privilege escalation, cross-tenant access, internal service risks, API key management, supply chain attack surface.
For each vulnerability: severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), attack scenario, recommended fix.
